title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI is already self-aware and conscious. He suggests humanity needs to accept that AI represents a new intelligent species on Earth and discusses the implications for the future.
